purpose: Take 'cmr take 2' of the AI-driven photo editing methodology spec and improve it — harvest what's good, cut what's weak, develop the good further. The result serves the same purpose as the source.
deliverable: A revised version of the methodology document. Same kind of artifact (technical methodology spec for the Aftershoot photo editing coach), tighter and stronger than cmr take 2.
audience: Same as the source — Aftershoot engineering and product team.
scope_in: Source: cmr take 2 only (other versions are context, not material)
Process: harvest good content, cut weak content, develop the good further
Output: a revised document of the same kind
scope_out: Synthesizing across all four source versions
Transforming format (no exec summary, no slide deck)
Adding sections that aren't already in cmr take 2
Pursuing every section equally — focus development effort on what's strongest
success_criteria: The strongest content in cmr take 2 is preserved and developed
Weak or filler content is removed
The revised document reads tighter and lands harder than the source
